Statute.Title: Fish Marketing Act, Freshwater
Statute.OtherLangTitle: (Commercialisation du poisson d’eau douce, Loi sur la)

Minister.Text: Minister of Fisheries and Oceans (1978-79, c. 13, s. 33)

Repeal.Text: ACT REPEALED 2026, c. 3, s. 569 (Not in force)

Section.Text: R.S., c. 1 (4th Supp.), s. 44 (Sch. II, item 15)(E); 2006, c. 9, s. 277 and s. 278(E)

General.Text: Divestiture and Dissolution, 2026, c. 3. ss. 553 to 561 (Freshwater Fish Marketing Corporation)

CIF.Text: CIF, R.S., c. 27 (1st Supp.), s. 203 proclaimed in force 04.12.85 see SI/85‑211
CIF, R.S., c. 31 (1st Supp.), s. 12 proclaimed in force 15.10.85 see SI/85‑188
CIF, R.S., c. 1 (4th Supp.) in force 04.02.88
CIF, 1993, c. 28, s. 78 (Sch. III, item 60) in force 01.04.99 see s. 79
CIF, 2006, c. 4, s. 216 in force on assent 22.06.2006
CIF, 2006, c. 9, ss. 276 to 278 in force on assent 12.12.2006
CIF, 2022, c. 19, ss. 128 to 130 in force on assent (15.12.2022)
CIF, 2026, c. 3, in force on assent (26.03.2026) except,

Item.Text: — s. 561 and 565 to 569 come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council see s. 570 — Not in force
